hero.title: Our First Original IP - GEN SOL
hero.description: A bold sci-fi universe designed to power games, films, streaming shows and merchandise at a global scale. Gen Sol is an expansive world with deep lore, striking visuals, and compelling characters driven by purpose and conflict. Beyond traditional mediums, we aim to pioneer new forms of entertainment that blur the lines between the digital and physical worlds.

powerOfStories.title: The Power of Stories
powerOfStories.paragraph1: Although there are other projects with similar aspirations, what sets Gen Sol apart is its singular focus on dramatic storytelling. Following the core values of Nasun, Gen Sol will not only engage the user as a narrative and technological experience, but it will give them an emotional one. By populating the Gen Sol Galaxy with exciting stories and compelling characters driven by strong motivations, the user will develop a deep relationship with the project that will capture their imaginations.
powerOfStories.paragraph2: For entertainment, Web3 has mainly focused on gaming, so why the inclusion of narrative content in Gen Sol's model?
powerOfStories.paragraph3: Engaging narrative content has always been a powerful economic driver for many other markets like merchandising as well as games. Gen Sol will provide the fertile ground for the development of these products to be offered in various marketplaces under one umbrella IP.
powerOfStories.paragraph4: People love good stories and all things connected to it. Whether it be a piece of art, toy or game, they become more meaningful and valuable because of these associations. Deep emotional ties with the stories develop, and it’s these strong relationships that will create value beyond the traditional markets.

koreanConnection.title: The Korean Connection
koreanConnection.p1: The core team’s experience and strong relationships in the Korean entertainment industry will be pivotal in paving the way for the project’s success during the first phases of the roadmap. In producing the initial games, animation series, live-action show and movie, the community will collaborate with top South Korean filmmakers, famous Hallyu actors, writers as well as premiere gaming and animation studios. We will then expand to partner with the studios, filmmakers and actors from around the world.
koreanConnection.p2: In the bootstrap phase, the Korean entertainment industry gives us access to professional film crews and streamlined production processes using the latest technologies capable of delivering high quality products on tight schedules and competitive budgets. World-renowned gaming, animation and CGI studios are also located in South Korea. Working with the Korean entertainment industry can be a springboard to later gain access to other global A-list talents and platforms.

marketing.title: Story-Based Marketing
marketing.p1: Narrative content is a powerful tool for marketing as it provides many unique, dramatic moments to share and capture the public’s attention. Movie and show trailers are some of the best marketing material one can come up with, and they become possible by editing down longer format content to the most visually spectacular and emotionally resonant moments. Gen Sol intends to focus heavily on creating compelling trailers effective for marketing and promotional purposes.
marketing.p2: Because the live-action and feature film projects will be casting famous actors and actresses, it will afford many marketing potentialities beyond the Web3-bubble by accessing entertainment outlets and social media communities like Youtube channels and Twitter accounts focused on movies and narrative content.

globalMarket.title: Global Market
globalMarket.p1: Even though we will initially collaborate with filmmakers from South Korea, Gen Sol is a sci-fi project, so its premise will be culturally neutral, and its intended audience will be global.
globalMarket.p2: Narrative content and games will be in English, all except the first live-action series which will cast Korean stars for some of the main roles and so could be a mix of English and Korean(subtitled).

overarching.title: Overarching Narrative
overarching.intro: Everything will revolve around the main sci-fi setting.
overarching.p1: The feature film and flagship game will deal directly with an overarching narrative of competing in the V Games for control of the Vertex Zone, the source of all spectra.
overarching.p2: The live-action series and the first tournament games will reveal not only the dramatic and suspenseful competition leading up to the V Games but also the political power plays behind the scenes.
overarching.p3: The animation series and the first third person multiplayer game will be the b-sides, telling smaller but no less compelling stories of outlaws, ronins, and anti-heroes operating on the fringes of the galaxy.
overarching.p4: All the various mediums will share many crossover elements like favorite characters, weapons, spaceships, robots, locations and plot-lines.
overarching.p5: Because of the unified narrative and aesthetic ambitions of Gen Sol, both the narrative content and games will grow from the same seeds of story ideations and visual conceptualizations.

narrative.title: Narrative
narrative.description: From Emperors of intergalactic civilizations to petty thieves, all are bound by one obsession: Spectra—the unholy fuel that runs all of the Gen Sol Galaxy. To possess enough is to command wealth, power and even the holy grail of eternal life.

category1.title: FEATURE FILMS & FLAGSHIP
category1.description: Confront the central conflict on an epic scale as the main players do everything in their power to win the V Games.

category2.title: STREAMING SHOWS & TOURNAMENT GAMES
category2.description: Peel back the layers to reveal the intrigue, politics, and power plays leading up to the V Games.

category3.title: ANIMATION & MULTIPLAYER SHOOTER
category3.description: Uncover the b-sides — the stories of outlaws, ronin, and anti-heroes surviving on the fringes of the Gen Sol Galaxy.

animation.title: ANIMATION SERIES
animation.p1: Designed to tell the ‘small’ intimate stories against the vast backdrop of the Gen Sol Galaxy, the animation series will consist of a set number of episodes focused on giving the audience high-stakes drama with emotional resonance, each one ending on a suspenseful cliffhanger.
animation.p2: ‘The Spectra Heist’, the first animated series will offer a first peek into the Gen Sol Galaxy, its vision of alluring beauty and terrifying horror. The series will reveal secrets and lore of the galaxy to be explored further in the live-action series and feature films.
animation.p3: Josen embarks on a desperate mission to save his little girl who has been kidnapped by sinister forces in order to blackmail him into stealing a rare form of spectra energy from the Dorakken Empire. To accomplish this, Josen must enlist the help of the most notorious criminal in the Gen Sol Galaxy, known as the Kid.
animation.p4: In a thrilling, suspenseful story following the footsteps of classic action films like 'Man from Nowhere,’ Josen and the Kid become interlocked in a battle of wits and strength spiraling into a shocking conclusion as they attempt to pull off the ultimate heist.

liveAction.title: LIVE-ACTION SHOW
liveAction.p1: The first live-action series, ‘The Heir Apparent’, will tell one of the most pivotal moments in the Dorakken Empire’s reign over the Gen Sol Galaxy. They have won 29 consecutive V Games, control the Vertex Zone and have an iron grip on every planetary system.
liveAction.p2: The story centers on the power play between three siblings who vie to be crowned the Dorakken Emperor as their father, who was one of the greatest drivers of robots, is dying from injuries incurred competing in the last V Games. Two brothers and a sister plot, connive and fight to take the throne as each fantasizes of becoming the victorious driver for the next V Games, sealing their power over the entire Gen Sol Galaxy.
liveAction.p3: While following this dramatic power struggle, the series will delve into the political, technological and mystical aspects of the Gen Sol Galaxy. It will give insight into how the galaxy is run by spectra energy, and how it gave rise to the alliances and rivalries between the different alien races, intergalactic empires and space fleets.
liveAction.p4: More so than the animated series, the live-action series will reveal the real power players in the Gen Sol Galaxy, and the ruthless lengths they will go to maintain their power and the humanity they are willing to lose.

movies.title: MOVIES
movies.p1: The V Games Trilogy will tell the unlikely tale of how a poor kid named Moonoak from a neglected region of the Gen Sol Galaxy fights against all odds to become one of the greatest robot drivers. Moonoak’s meteoric rise ignites a fierce obsession from the one true heir of the Dorakken Empire, and their rivalry becomes the stuff of legends as their destinies collide in a climactic finale.

shooters.title: SPECTRA
shooters.p1: Like the initial work of the pre-visualization for the animated series, the community will collaborate together on the first game beta release. The first Gen Sol game, SPECTRA, will be a third person multiplayer shooter set in a smaller narrative in the Gen Sol Galaxy starting with 3 maps. Each setting will tell its own unique story creating intense suspense and compelling ways for the players to strategize against each other. This will let the community focus on delivering a fleshed out, innovative game that is fun and competitive. By launching on only a few maps, we will deliver an exciting, fun gaming experience on a realistic timeline and budget, in turn creating enthusiasm and momentum.
shooters.p2: The current prototype is a stripped down version of the third person multiplayer shooter game. The game will exist in the outskirts of the Gen Sol Galaxy involving raiders, trackers and mercenaries that will have overlapping story elements with the first animated series. It will offer the first look into Gen Sol’s gaming universe while getting feedback from the community, generating opportunities for greater engagement and participation.

spectraGames.title: THE V GAMES
spectraGames.p1: The V Games held every three years will be the crown jewel competitive gaming experience in Gen Sol. The games and narrative content will interweave and build up to the first feature film and the V Games.

arkverse.title: GENVERSE
arkverse.p1: As the project grows and more of the narrative is revealed, we envision the gaming environment becoming more expansive as the maps interconnect allowing players to travel freely between them. They can then interact with each other for different purposes, either participate in the main narrative arcs or go off on their own side stories: from operating legitimate businesses, getting involved in criminal activities, forming interstellar civilizations or even starting invasions to engage in inter-planetery wars.
arkverse.p2: Each iteration of the game will build on the previous version, evolving into an open world setting that will include the whole Gen Sol Galaxy known as the GenVerse, the interface between our everyday reality and the fictional universe of Gen Sol. At this point, the gaming will blend seamlessly with the narratives that drive everything forward.
arkverse.p3: Eventually, the tournaments and even the V Games would become events that unfold in real-time within the GenVerse, the users would form communities that would represent civilizations and alien races in the Gen Sol Galaxy, incorporating complex economic systems and various forms of political structures/governance operating inside it. The vision is to build a place where people will want to visit to have an adventure, enjoy financial gains and form friendships with others in the community.
arkverse.p4: The vision is for the community to create new Gen Sol storylines, expanding on previous ones. We will dream up intergalactic civilizations that will all have their own origin tales, culture, physiology and technology. The community participating in the development of the GenVerse as a powerful and entertaining experience will be one of the most exciting aspects of Gen Sol.

fanCommunity.title: FAN COMMUNITY
fanCommunity.p1: The spiritual heart of Gen Sol will always be its passionate community. Its charter, power and guidelines will develop as it matures and becomes more involved in the success of the project. Sci-fi films and games have always formed die-hard fans and communities with strong passions and stronger opinions, Gen Sol's own sci-fi community will be no different.
